revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 27 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 27 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月27日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[文和]]元年/[[正平]]7年（[[1352年]]_月_日） - 北朝が文和に改元 * [[万延]]元年（[[1860年]]_月_日） - [[日米修好条約]]に調印した遣米使節団77人が帰国
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]12年（[[1829年]][[10月24日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[剣客]]（+ [[1865年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月26日 (旧暦)|9月26日]] 翌日[[9月28日 (旧暦)|9月28日]] - 前月[[8月27日 (旧暦)|8月27日]] 翌月[[10月27日 (旧暦)|10月27日]] *新暦[[9月27日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[文和]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1352年]][[11月4日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[観応]]から文和に[[改元]]。 * [[万延]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1860年]][[11月9日]]） - [[日米修好通商条約]]に調印した[[万延元年遣米使節|遣米使節団]]77人が帰国。
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[10月24日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[剣術|剣客]]（+ [[1865年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘化]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1848年]][[10月23日]]） - [[中川五郎治]]、日本における[[種痘]]法の祖（* [[1768年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:September 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿七]] [[zh:九月廿七]] [[en:draft:September 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.

[[sn:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿七]] [[zh:九月廿七]] [[en:draft:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|文和}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1352|ja|1352}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|観応}} to {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} . * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団}} ) returned home after signing the {{Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Takeichi Mizusan|ja|武市瑞山}} (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Yōchō|ja|弘化}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治}} , considered the founder of variolation († {{ill|1768|ja|1768}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿七]] [[zh:九月廿七]] [[en:draft:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|文和}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1352|ja|1352}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō}} to {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} . * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団}} ) returned home after signing the [[Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Takeichi Mizusan|ja|武市瑞山}} (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Yōchō|ja|弘化}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治}} , considered the founder of variolation († {{ill|1768|ja|1768}} ).

[[sn:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿七]] [[zh:九月廿七]] [[en:draft:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|文和}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1352|ja|1352}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō}} to {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} . * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団}} ) returned home after signing the [[Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Takeichi Mizusan|ja|武市瑞山}} (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Yōchō|ja|弘化}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治}} , considered the founder of variolation († {{ill|1768|ja|1768}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月27日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[文和]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1352年]][[11月4日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[観応]]から文和に[[改元]]。 * [[万延]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1860年]][[11月9日]]） - [[日米修好通商条約]]に調印した[[万延元年遣米使節|遣米使節団]]77人が帰国。
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[10月24日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[剣術|剣客]]（+ [[1865年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘化]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1848年]][[10月23日]]） - [[中川五郎治]]、日本における[[種痘]]法の祖（* [[1768年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|26|9|28|8|27|10|9|0927}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[9月27日 (旧暦)]] to [[September 27 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 27|qq=September 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|qq=}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|qq=}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿七]]
{{translated page|ja|9月27日 (旧暦)|version=94134848|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar September]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:September 27 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] }}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 27일]] [[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月廿七]]

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|qq=|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|qq=|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840076]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 27|qq=September 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|qq=|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|qq=|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840076]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 27|qq=September 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840076]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 27|qq=September 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Bunna|Wadō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] . * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the [[:en:Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce]].
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takeichi Mizusan]] (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († [[:en:1865|1865]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōka|Yōchō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († [[:en:1768|1768]] ).

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿七]][[zh:九月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840076]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 27|qq=September 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|WD=Q1146252|lt=Wadō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1352|en|1352|WD=Q6112|lt=1352}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|WD=Q1146252|lt=Bunwa}} . * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|en|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|WD=Q1194699|lt=Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takeichi Mizusan}} (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Yōchō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († {{ill|1768|en|1768|WD=Q7675|lt=1768}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|WD=Q1146252|lt=Wadō|1=Bunna}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1352|en|1352|WD=Q6112|lt=1352|1=1352}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4|1=November 4}} ） – The Northern Court ({{ill|Kitachō|ja|北朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitachō|1=Northern Dynasties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207446}} ) changed its era name from {{ill|Kangō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|WD=Q1146252|lt=Bunwa|1=Bunna}} . * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – A 77-member mission to America ({{ill|Emissary to America|ja|遣米使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emissary to America|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) returned home after signing the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|en|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|WD=Q1194699|lt=Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce|1=Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24|1=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takeichi Mizusan|1=Takechi Hanpeita}} (Hanpeita), a pro-sonnō activist and swordsman († {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Yōchō|1=Kōka}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ） – {{ill|Nakagawa Gorōji|ja|中川五郎治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Gorōji|1=Nakagawa Gorōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11364755}} , considered the founder of variolation († {{ill|1768|en|1768|WD=Q7675|lt=1768|1=1768}} ).
